items.title: Anthropic Academy
items.desc: 17 门课程，5 天完整规划，从入门到进阶。基于 Jas Wong 的 Builders 路径，结合 AWS 企业背景定制。

items.title: The unreasonable effectiveness of HTML
items.desc: Twenty self-contained .html files an agent produced instead of a wall of markdown. Each one trades a document you'd skim for one you'd actually read. Grouped by the kind of work they replace.
